results.rendered_html:
prasphuṭa (1. pra + sphuṭa) adj.
1〉 aufgebrochen, aufgeblüht  ŚABDAR. _im_ ŚKDR. 
— 2〉 offenbar, deutlich  MĀRK. P. 37,21 .  PRATĀPAR. 12,a,3 .  KĀVYĀD. 1,40 . prāyaḥ kalaṅka evendoḥ prasphuṭo na prasannatā  Spr. 2311 . kimapyaprasphuṭaṃ bruvan  KATHĀS. 13,109 .

prasphuṭa a.
1 Blown, opened, expanded (as a flower).
2 Divulged, published, spread abroad (as a report).
3 Plain, clear, manifest, evident.
